Billing

Top-ups and wallet balance.

Balance

Balance
-
Verified
-

"Verified" re-derives your balance from the append-only ledger - it should match.

Top up

Add money to your wallet with Stripe. Payment methods are handled by Stripe; we never store your card.

$

Test mode - use card 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future expiry and CVC.

Top-ups are not enabled on this broker yet.
